title: State butterfly
doc_html:
§164.1. State butterfly

            There shall be an official state butterfly, which shall be the Gulf Fritillary. The use of its likeness or image on official documents of the state and with the insignia of the state is hereby authorized.

            Acts 2022, No. 294, §1.
doc_text:
§164.1.  State butterfly
There shall be an official state butterfly, which shall be the Gulf Fritillary.  The use
of its likeness or image on official documents of the state and with the insignia of the state
is hereby authorized.
Acts 2022, No. 294, §1.
